t_ch: 跟我说说，你信不过哪个泰坦？还是说你瞧不起拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄？
t_en: Now, which Titan's power do you doubt? Or perhaps you question the integrity of the great hero who saved Amphoreus?

t_ch: 像蜜花乘着风，飘向更广阔的世界…来自小小村落的妖精，终于登上了更大的舞台迷！
t_en: Like a honey flower carried by the wind, drifting toward a vaster world... The fairy from a tiny village has finally stepped onto a grander stage, mem!

t_ch: 但外面的世界，充满了全新的挑战……
t_en: But the world out there is full of brand-new challenges...

t_ch: 所以，我们必须刻苦练习，绝不能掉以轻心，把舞会的桂冠拱手相让迷！
t_en: So, we must practice hard and never let our guard down. We can't just hand over the dance crown to them, mem!

t_ch: 新的挑战是指…
t_en: "New challenges" meaning...

t_ch: 你可能有所不知迷，外面的世界有名为「奇美拉」和「小海豹」的模样奇特的妖精，还有叫做「大地兽」的大怪兽…都深受欢迎！
t_en: You might not know this, but out there in the world, there are peculiar-looking creatures like chimeras and baby seals, and huge creatures called dromases... They're all super popular!

t_ch: 这位客人，我们和它们谁更可爱？想听听你公正的判断迷。
t_en: Hey there, customer! Who's cuter, us or them? I'd love to hear your honest opinion, mem.

t_ch: 当然是你们啦，小妖精！
t_en: Of course it's you, little fairies!

t_ch: 谢谢你，我有信心多了。不然，上台前手心里还捏着一把汗迷！
t_en: Thanks, I feel more confident now. Otherwise, my palms would've been super sweaty before going on stage, mem!

t_ch: 它们也未尝没有可取之处…
t_en: They might have some redeeming qualities...

t_ch: 迷…意料之外的答案……
t_en: Mem... an unexpected answer...

t_ch: 那么，我们更要刻苦练习，用舞蹈赢得所有人的心迷！
t_en: Then we must practice even harder and win everyone's hearts with our dance, mem!

t_ch: 呃…天气还挺好的？
t_en: Uh... nice weather, right?

t_ch: ——不要转移话题迷！
t_en: ...Hey, don't change the topic, mem!

t_ch: 外面的世界好玩吗？
t_en: Is the world out there fun?

t_ch: 外面的世界太热闹啦！这里有闪着荧光的粉色花朵，猜不透怎么造出来的大屋子，还有来自世界各个角落的客人……
t_en: The world out there is just so lively! There are glowing pink flowers, enormous buildings made in ways I can't begin to guess, and guests from every corner of the world...

t_ch: 千万不要告诉村长，我都不想回迷境去了迷。
t_en: Please don't tell the village chief, but I almost don't want to go back to the Maze anymore, mem.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 身为舞者，我的答案当然是——希望你能记住我们的舞姿迷！
t_en: As a dancer, my answer is obvious. I hope you'll remember our mesmerizing moves, mem!

t_ch: 就这？没有礼物吗？
t_en: That's it? No gift?

t_ch: 这个选项都是会送礼物的…
t_en: All these options come with gifts...

t_ch: 咦，有这样的设定吗？我们怎么不知道迷？
t_en: Huh? Is that actually part of the setting? How come we never heard about it, mem?

t_ch: 不过，蜜花盛开后会凋落，田地会逐渐荒芜，就连鹅卵石也会在漫长的等待中磨成粉末。但宝贵的回忆，永远不会褪色迷！
t_en: But honey-producing flowers wither after they bloom, fields gradually turn barren, and even pebbles crumble to dust as time drags on. Yet precious memories never lose their shine, mem!

t_ch: 这就是——世界送给我们的最好的礼物！
t_en: This is the greatest gift the world has given us!

t_ch: 期待你们的演出。
t_en: Looking forward to your performance.

t_ch: 到演出那天，一定要来支持我们迷！
t_en: Make sure to come and support us at the show, mem!

t_ch: 金丝捎来讯息， 一股暗流正在城中酝酿。在它发展到难以收拾前，我们有必要将其扼杀在源头。
t_en: The golden thread brings word that a dark undercurrent is brewing in the city. We must nip it in the bud before it grows beyond our control.

t_ch: 裁缝女，今天可是休息日，要我干活，得加钱噢。
t_en: It's a rest day, seamstress. If you want me to work, you'll have to pay extra.

t_ch: 呵，赛法利娅，对你来说，哪天不是休息日？若非事态紧急，我不会把两位召集至此。
t_en: Heh. When is it not a rest day for you, Cifera? I wouldn't have called you both here if it weren't urgent.

t_ch: 事关重大，你们要做好心理准备。
t_en: This is no trivial matter, so steel your hearts.

t_ch: 不知受何人撺掇，白厄竟然…又动了「挑些色彩靓丽的衣饰」的念头。
t_en: Maybe someone had been whispering into his ears, but Phainon had been thinking of... "picking out colorful clothing" again.

t_ch: 那实在太坏了！
t_en: That's awful!

t_ch: 把大家喊出来，就为了这事啊。
t_en: You called everyone here just for that?

t_ch: 呵…当真是一番有趣的开场白。
t_en: Heh... now that's quite an intriguing opening line.

t_ch: 听见裁缝女说玩笑，就像看见家里的猫翻跟头，虽说在情理之中，但总觉得有些奇怪。
t_en: Hearing you make a joke is like watching a house cat do a somersault. While not entirely impossible... it still feels rather strange.

t_ch: 呵呵，不多下些饵料，恐怕游鱼会不屑一顾，也勾不起猫儿的好奇心呢。
t_en: Heh. The fish won't bother to bite without enough bait, and the cat definitely won't have her curiosity stirred otherwise.

t_ch: 言归正传，我打算重建织坊。把大家召集到这里，是希望你们能助我一臂之力。
t_en: Back to business. I plan to rebuild the weaving workshop. And the reason I gathered you here is that I hope you can lend me a hand.

t_ch: 听你话里话外这意思，裁缝女，原来你是打算拉我们合伙呀？
t_en: From the way you're talking, seamstress, sounds like you're trying to rope us into a partnership, huh?

t_ch: 可骑士放下剑柄，又能做些什么呢？
t_en: What else can a knight do once they lay down their sword hilt?

t_ch: 我可没说让你放下剑柄。织坊需要缝纫，亦需要裁剪。如何分辨纹理、理顺针脚…不熟稔锋刃的人可没法胜任。
t_en: I never said to put down your sword hilt. A weaving workshop needs both sewing and cutting. Discerning patterns, aligning stitches... someone unfamiliar with blades couldn't handle the job.

t_ch: 无论如何，有大家作伴，总比成天闷头喝蜜酿来得好些吧？
t_en: Anyway, having your company is better than spending all day drinking honey brew alone, wouldn't you agree?

t_ch: 呵，真是一尾耳目众多的金鳟啊……
t_en: Heh, quite a well-connected golden trout we have here...

t_ch: 海瑟音姐姐出马，恐怕布料还没反应过来，就已经被裁断了吧？
t_en: With big sis Hysilens on the job, I bet those fabrics won't even know what hit them before they're cut!

t_ch: 那我呢，总不会又让我跑腿吧？
t_en: What about me? Don't tell me I'm running errands again?

t_ch: 你来做股东！
t_en: You'll be a shareholder!

t_ch: 好主意！我攒下的那些奇珍异宝，足够尝尝当老板的滋味了。
t_en: Great idea! With all those rare treasures I've saved up, I can finally get a taste of being the boss!

t_ch: 你来做销售！
t_en: You do the sales!

t_ch: 唔…从别人家里掏东西，我很擅长，但要把东西往别人家里塞，这还是头一遭。
t_en: Hmm... I'm good at taking stuff from other people's homes, but putting things into them? That's a first.

t_ch: 你来做设计师！
t_en: You be the designer!

t_ch: 好啊，我就先按灰子你这一身，设计一套「救世主同款」的天外来客套装！咦，没准我还挺有生意头脑的？
t_en: Great! I'll model it after your Gray Mystery style and design a "Deliverer-inspired" sky-beyonder outfit! Hey, maybe I've got some business sense after all?

t_ch: 既然大家都同意，那么等我勘定场地，便择日开工。对了，赛法利娅，今后你可不能再用「裁缝女」这个称呼叫我了。
t_en: Since you all agree, I'll survey the site and then pick a date to start the work. By the way, Cifera, you mustn't address me as "seamstress" from now on.

t_ch: 既然入了伙，现在你也是「裁缝女」。
t_en: Now that you're part of the crew, you're also a "seamstress."

t_ch: 呃？！糟糕，你给我做局是吧！
t_en: Huh!? Darn it, you're setting me up!

t_ch: 我很高兴，能在你的见证下重建织坊。
t_en: I'm glad that I can rebuild the weaving workshop with you as my witness.

t_ch: 裁缝铺三巨头，集合！
t_en: The Three Tailoring Titans, assemble!

t_ch: 说实话，赛法利娅是否会接受邀请，我真有点拿不准。
t_en: To be honest, I'm not quite sure whether Cifera will accept the invitation.

t_ch: 或许正因为你在场周旋，她才会选择加入。我必须向你道谢。
t_en: Perhaps it was your presence and mediation that made her choose to join. I must thank you for that.

t_ch: 我来当模特。
t_en: I'll be the model.

t_ch: 呵呵，没问题。你的身材匀称，无论穿什么都很精神。这是来自织者的判断，并非客套的场面话。
t_en: Hehe, no problem. You have a well-proportioned figure, which looks great in anything you wear. That's a weaver's professional judgment, not just empty flattery.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 这枚物件，你一定很熟悉了——那位聋哑女孩送我的髀石护身符，我希望能将它转交给你。
t_en: You must be familiar with this item. It's the talisman made of femoral stone that the non-hearing, non-speaking girl gave me. I'd like to pass it on to you.

t_ch: 虽然它已不再具备墨涅塔的神力，但它依然是最纯粹的「浪漫」象征。希望高洁的灵魂能够永远守护你的旅程。
t_en: Though it no longer possesses Mnestia's divine power, it remains the purest symbol of "Romance." May the spirit of nobility forever guard your journey.

t_ch: 祝你们创业顺利。
t_en: Good luck with your startup!

t_ch: 谢谢。在织坊的日子，是我回忆里极为温暖的时光。若是能重回那样的生活，我很期待。
t_en: Thank you. My days at the weaving workshop were some of the warmest memories I have. I look forward to returning to that kind of life.

t_ch: 呵，没想到我的剑艺，竟能在裁衣方面有所作为。
t_en: Heh, who would've thought my swordsmanship could come in handy for tailoring?

t_ch: 对这份邀请很意外吗？
t_en: Surprised by this invitation?

t_ch: 无论什么，都避不过金织爵的丝线。我想，她或许是看我百无聊赖，所以想用这个法子，让我寻些实际的事做吧。
t_en: Nothing can escape Dux Goldweaver's threads. I guess she probably saw how bored to death I was, so she used this method to get me to do something more productive.

t_ch: 呵…真是有劳她费心了呀。
t_en: Heh... how thoughtful of her.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 值得铭记的东西…小灰鱼是打算把它带去天外之海吗？也好……
t_en: Something worth remembering... Little Gray Fry, do you plan to take it to the sea beyond the sky? That works too...

t_ch: 这枚骨螺来自斯缇科西亚的海床，是我许多年前采撷的，历经风霜仍保持光洁。
t_en: I collected this shell fossil from the seabed of Styxia many years ago, and it still retains its pristine shine despite weathering through snow and storms.

t_ch: 请务必好好珍藏——不如，就摆在你的床头吧？
t_en: Make sure to treasure it well. How about displaying it by your bedside?

t_ch: 可以开始练习了！
t_en: Let's start practicing!

t_ch: 嗯，我去买些布匹练练力道。不然，若是失手毁掉人台，可不好交代了。
t_en: Hmm, I'll go buy some fabric to practice my technique. After all, it would be quite awkward if I accidentally destroyed the mannequin.

t_ch: 我就知道裁缝女叫我们来准没安好心，这不，又想让我们帮她打工了。
t_en: I knew that seamstress had something up her sleeve when she called us here. Look, she's trying to get us to work for her again.

t_ch: 这次你也是老板。
t_en: You're also the boss this time.

t_ch: 哼哼，那她可算是找对人了。要论经营的智慧，这城里可没人比得过我——就连那个树庭男孩都不行！
t_en: Heh heh, then she's definitely found the right person. When it comes to business smarts, no one in this city can match me, not even that Grove boy!

t_ch: 恭喜你找到工作了！
t_en: Congrats on finding a job!

t_ch: 是啊，不过，一想到又要朝九晚五准点到岗，我就连尾巴都打蔫了。
t_en: Yeah, but just thinking about having to clock in nine-to-five makes even my tail droop.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 咦，灰子，你、你怎么说出这么肉麻的话！
t_en: Huh? Gray Mystery, h—how could you say something so mushy!

t_ch: 需要提醒才能记住的东西，恐怕本来就没有记住的必要吧？
t_en: If you need a reminder to remember something, maybe it wasn't worth remembering in the first place, huh?

t_ch: 如果你实在想留个纪念，就拿着这枚猫咪硬币吧，反正我也用不上它了。
t_en: If you really want a souvenir, take this cat coin. It's not like I have any use for it anyway.

t_ch: 别忘了我们啊，灰子！
t_en: Don't forget about us, Gray Mystery!

t_ch: 回聊回聊。
t_en: We'll talk later!

t_ch: 好啊，灰子，等裁缝铺开张，记得要来光顾。别和她们说，我偷偷给你打折！
t_en: Great, Gray Mystery! When the tailor shop opens, make sure to drop by. Don't tell them, but I'll secretly give you a discount!

t_ch: 哟！
t_en: Yo!

t_ch: 嗬！
t_en: Sup?

t_ch: ——这不终将升起的烈阳吗？
t_en: ...Isn't this the Blazing Sun that is destined to rise?

t_ch: ——这不此世必要的伤痛吗？
t_en: ...Isn't this the agony this world needs?

t_ch: 我的脚趾在抠三室两厅了。
t_en: This is so awkward I wanna sink through the floor.

t_ch: 相声社翁法罗斯分社？
t_en: Is this a duo comedy act, Amphoreus chapter?

t_ch: 我是来加入你们的。
t_en: I'm here to join you.

t_ch: 好搭档，那你也表演一下那个吧，就是……
t_en: Hey partner, why don't you do that thing too, you know...

t_ch: 「但我并非『救世主』，而是——」
t_en: "But I am not the Deliverer—"

t_ch: 「与凡人同在的『无名客』！」
t_en: "But rather the Nameless who dwells among mortals—"

t_ch: 嗯，就是这样，你的气势比我们两个还要火热十足啊！
t_en: Hmm, that's right, your spirit is even more fiery and intense than two of us combined!

t_ch: 坏，都被他记住了。
t_en: Drats, he remembered it all.

t_ch: 这种台词该在战斗时说！
t_en: That's the kind of line you should say during combat!

t_ch: 哈哈，拯救世界的任务完成之后，再说出这种话，果然还是有点像热血过头的笨蛋。
t_en: Haha, saying stuff like that after saving the world, you do sound like an over-enthusiastic goofball.

t_ch: 但是看到这家伙一脸揶揄地走过来，就猜到他会忍不住呛我几句…哎呀，还是和从前一样。
t_en: But seeing him walk over with that smirk on his face, I knew he couldn't resist taking a few jabs at me... Ah well, some things never change.

t_ch: 还没和你正式地说一声「好久不见」，万敌。
t_en: Haven't had the chance to properly say "long time no see," Mydei.

t_ch: …好久不见，白厄。
t_en: ...It's been a while, Phainon.

t_ch: 我已经听说了，在天外的「圣杯战争」中，有人的夙愿是回到过去的哀丽秘榭。
t_en: I've heard that in the "Holy Grail War" beyond the sky, someone's deepest wish was to return to the past Aedes Elysiae.

t_ch: 看到你和家人们亲热团聚的场景，还以为「救世主」只顾得上故乡的亲人，等到空闲时间才能和旧友打声招呼。
t_en: Seeing you having such an intimate reunion with your kinship, I thought the Deliverer would only have time for family from the homeland, and would only get around to greeting old friends when you had some spare time.

t_ch: 怎么会！我也是看到你跟歌耳戈王后和欧利庞王站在一起，场面难得温馨，才不忍心过去打扰的。
t_en: Of course not! I saw you with Queen Gorgo and King Eurypon, and the scene was so heartwarming that I didn't want to disturb you.

t_ch: 瞧，我还带了老妈做的蜂蜜烙饼和葡萄馅饼，滋味不输给悬锋城的羊奶石榴汁。
t_en: Look, I even brought honey suncakes and grape pies made by my mom. They're just as tasty as the pomegranate goat milk from Castrum Kremnos.

t_ch: 下回也带我去拜访拜访悬锋的先王和王后，让他们品尝一下哀丽秘榭的特产吧。
t_en: Next time, why not take me to visit the former King and Queen of Kremnos and let them have a taste of Aedes Elysiae's specialties?

t_ch: 记得有人童年还想去悬锋学武？
t_en: Didn't someone want to practice martial arts in Kremnos when he was a kid?

t_ch: 有人还写过普逃馅饼的错别字？
t_en: Didn't someone misspell "graype pies" before?

t_ch: 诶诶，咱们还是不是好搭档了？虽然我把背负的「记忆」和「心愿」都托付给了你，也不要在这种时候全部揭露啊……
t_en: Hey, hey, aren't we still partners? Even though I entrusted you with my memories and wishes, there's no need to reveal everything at a time like this...

t_ch: 其实那时候，我满脑子都是大家的「心愿」，对自己的「心愿」还是一片空白，只想回到命运的指针转动之前…挽救还未发生的事情。
t_en: Back then, my mind was filled with everyone else's wishes, while my own wish remained a complete blank. I just wanted to turn back the hands of destiny... to prevent what had yet to happen.

t_ch: 但现在，我从空白中找到了新生的含义，慢慢有了新的愿望。
t_en: But now, I've found meaning in the blankness, and gradually, new desires are taking shape.

t_ch: 这么拐弯抹角，不像你的风格。是什么愿望，就直接说吧，{NICKNAME}也在听着。
t_en: Being so roundabout isn't like you at all. Just tell us what you wish for directly. {NICKNAME} is also listening.

t_ch: 嗯，万敌，抱歉，我想正式和你说一声……
t_en: Um, Mydei, sorry, I want to formally tell you something...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#歌尔巴尼帕尔大图书馆}你的图书馆{RUBY_E#}，还能再带我去看看吗？
t_en: Can you take me to {RUBY_B#Gibranipar Grand Library}your library{RUBY_E#} again?

t_ch: 我的图书馆并未设锁，「钥匙」在立下约定的那一刻就已经递交到你手中了。
t_en: My library has no locks. The key was placed in your hands the moment our promise was made.

t_ch: 我解读一下：约定一直作数。
t_en: Let me break it down: The promise still stands.

t_ch: 原来你的图书馆是邀请制。
t_en: So your library is invite-only.

t_ch: 自然也对天外的「救世主」开放，你不是已经读过其中几篇了吗？
t_en: Naturally, it's also open to the Deliverer from beyond the sky. Haven't you already read some of those articles?

t_ch: 哈哈，是吗？太好啦！！
t_en: Haha, really? That's fantastic!!!

t_ch: 好搭档，如果去万敌的图书馆，你最想看什么类型的藏书？
t_en: Hey partner, if you could visit Mydei's library, what kind of books would you most want to check out?

t_ch: 如果是他的品味…
t_en: If it's his taste...

t_ch: 应该比较酸牙吧？大概会有他喜欢的诗歌，悬锋城的史传……
t_en: Must be quite a sour taste, I'd say? There's probably some poetry he likes, and chronicles of Castrum Kremnos...

t_ch: 说不定还有一些失传的悬锋古语？悄悄多学几句，下次就知道怎么应对他了。
t_en: Maybe there are some lost Kremnos sayings? If I secretly learn a few more, I'd know how to deal with him next time.

t_ch: 你是不是…曾经去过？
t_en: Have you... been there before?

t_ch: 你怎么知道的？
t_en: How do you know that?

t_ch: 其实，我的脑海中有一副画面：与残破的城墙相比，悬锋的图书馆却保存得异常完好，我想捡起一本卷轴仔细看一看，眼睛却被烧得模糊，怎么也看不清上面的文字……
t_en: Actually, there's a scene in my mind: Compared to the crumbling city walls, the library of Kremnos was strangely well-preserved. I wanted to pick up a scroll to examine it closely, but my eyes were so scorched that I couldn't make out any of the text, no matter how hard I tried...

t_ch: 随后那些脆弱的纸本也在大火中燃烧起来……
t_en: Then those fragile volumes also went up in flames...

t_ch: 哈！都是些蒙了灰的记忆，我曾告诫自己永志不忘，却已经不确定究竟是梦中还是真实。但至少，这回再去，绝不会再是那样的场景了。
t_en: Ha! Just dusty old memories now. I swore to myself I'd never forget, but now I can't even tell if they were dreams or reality. At least this time, when I go back, things won't play out the same way.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 原先，我想把「侵晨」托付给你，但它见证了太多无谓的杀戮，恐怕不是件合适的礼物。
t_en: Originally, I wanted to entrust Dawnmaker to you, but it has witnessed too much pointless bloodshed. I fear it wouldn't make for an appropriate gift.

t_ch: 正巧哈托努斯在铸造它时，曾打造过一批仿件，这把就给你留作纪念吧，伙伴。
t_en: As luck would have it, Chartonus made a batch of replicas while forging it. I'll let you keep this one as a memento, partner.

t_ch: 我去问问他都有什么书。
t_en: I'll go ask him what books he has.

t_ch: 是你的风格！那就把惊喜感保留到最后一刻吧。
t_en: That's so you! Let's keep the surprise until the very last moment.

t_ch: 天外的救世主，与你也差了一句：「好久不见」。
t_en: The Deliverer from beyond the sky, this is for you too, "long time no see."

t_ch: 你的图书馆都有什么书？
t_en: What kind of books do you have in your library?

t_ch: 首先…悬锋城确有字典。虽然不比树庭广博，但也绝非人们以为的那样。
t_en: First of all... Castrum Kremnos does have dictionaries. Though not as extensive as the Grove's, they're far from what people assume them to be.

t_ch: 听说丹恒一直在补充星穹列车的智库，要带往天外的话，我会推荐托勒密早年写作的百邦历史给你们。
t_en: I heard Dan Heng has been updating the Astral Express's data bank. If you're bringing some beyond the sky, I'd recommend Ptolemy's early writings on the History of a Hundred Nations.

t_ch: 如果是白厄，想必会在鉴宝手册那里流连忘返。顺便，我还需要送他一本《如何读懂悬锋城的空气》。
t_en: If it's Phainon, he'd probably get lost in the appraisal manual. By the way, I should also get him a copy of How to Read the Air in Castrum Kremnos.

t_ch: 现在，我们都是救世主。
t_en: Now, we are all Deliverers.

t_ch: 若是这么说，「救世主」不是皇冠或者印戒，并非独一无二的权力象征，抑或什么珍贵的雅称，而是将履行…或已履行的命运。
t_en: If that's the case, "Deliverer" is not a crown or a signet, not a unique symbol of power, nor some precious honorific. It is a destiny to be fulfilled... or one that has already been fulfilled.

t_ch: 事到如今，在我称你或白厄为「救世主」时，已不再心存调侃或过分沉重的敬意……
t_en: Now, when I call you or Phainon the "Deliverer," there's no trace of mockery in my words, nor any of that burdensome reverence...

t_ch: 而是只有平静。正如远远望见，并呼唤一位归来的旧友。
t_en: ...Just a sense of peace. As if seeing an old friend from afar, and calling out to them.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 带上这盏水晶杯吧。每位曾和我并肩作战的伙伴，都有与我碰杯的资格。
t_en: Take this crystal chalice. Everyone who has fought by my side has earned the right to share a toast with me.

t_ch: 当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
t_en: When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—

t_ch: 歌耳戈之子，迈德漠斯，向你致意。
t_en: Mydeimos, son of Gorgo, sends his regards.

t_ch: 迈德漠斯，加冕为王！
t_en: Mydeimos, become king!

t_ch: 呵…衷心感谢你的祝愿。我早已是，今后亦是。
t_en: Heh... Thank you for your blessings. I always have been, and I always will be.

t_ch: 凯撒大人，你的皇冠后面…是不是粘上了什么东西？
t_en: Um, Great Imperator... I think there's something stuck on the back of your crown?

t_ch: 嗯？那便有劳「摇光爵」替我取下来吧。
t_en: Oh? Then be a dear, Dux Lucens, and take it off for me.

t_ch: 凯撒大人？怎么不是菈宝？
t_en: Great Imperator? Why not something cute, like "Cera"?

t_ch: 对逐火的大前辈还是要客气一点啦！
t_en: You have to be respectful to a senior of the Flame-Chase!

t_ch: 像小凯撒、小刻之类的，只能在心里偷偷喊一喊，灰宝说是不是？
t_en: You can only use nicknames like "Impy" or "Cery" in your head, don't say it out loud. Right, Grayie?

t_ch: 「摇光爵」？
t_en: Dux Lucens?

t_ch: 是我为粉发的爱卿新取的爵名，听说她与「冬霖爵」塞涅卡出自同族，皆是天空城邦的后裔。
t_en: It is a new peerage I have bestowed upon my dear, pink-haired subject. I am told she and Seneca, the Dux Brumalis, are from the same clan, descendants of the Sky city.

t_ch: 呵，但「冬霖爵」说起话来，往往让身边人如沐冬风，难受了许多，粉发的爱卿却像春日林间摇曳的微光，所以取了这个称号。
t_en: Heh, but Dux Brumalis's words often carry the bite of frigid winter, causing much discomfort to those around her. My dear pink-haired subject is like the dappled sunlight in a spring forest. Hence her title.

t_ch: 粘上什么了？我看看。
t_en: What is it? Let's see...

t_ch: 是一张小贴纸呢，谁这么大胆，居然敢在凯撒大人头上动土。灰宝一起来看吧，上面写的内容……
t_en: Oh, a little sticker! I wonder who was bold enough to stick this on her crown. Come on, Grayie, let's read it...

t_ch: 哎？竟然是……
t_en: Huh? It says...

t_ch: 「和我组一辈子的黄金裔吧」…嗯？
t_en: "Share your lifetime as Chrysos Heirs with me"?

t_ch: 这…是谁写的？
t_en: Who... wrote this?

t_ch: 看字迹，既不像阿格莱雅女士，也不像缇宝老师。唔，如果是蝶宝和万敌阁下的话，也不应该呀！他们和凯撒大人几乎从没正式见过面。
t_en: Judging by the handwriting, it's not Lady Aglaea or Lady Tribbie. Hmm, and it shouldn't be Cassie or Mydei! They've never formally met the Great Imperator.

t_ch: 是不是海宝？
t_en: Maybe it was Hysie?

t_ch: 「剑旗爵」？我与她的约定…不必以如此刻意的方式说出来。
t_en: Dux Gladiorum? Our promise... doesn't need to be stated in such a deliberate way.

t_ch: 难道是白宝？
t_en: Then maybe Snowy?

t_ch: 我印象里的卡厄斯兰那，若要向凯撒进言，可要更坦率直白些。
t_en: The Khaslana I know would be far more straightforward in his counsel to me, his Imperator.

t_ch: 最有可能是飞宝？
t_en: So it's most likely Ciphie?

t_ch: 狡猾的多洛斯小猫？逐火的军队里，她不是最想远离我们的人吗？
t_en: That crafty Dolos kitty? Of all the Flame-Chasers, isn't she the one most eager to keep her distance?

t_ch: 总不会是夏宝吧？
t_en: Surely it wasn't Naxy?

t_ch: 好恐怖！光是想想那刻夏老师提笔写这行字的画面，我就要把自己送进昏光庭院了。
t_en: How horrifying! Just picturing Professor Anaxa writing this note is enough to make me check myself into the Twilight Courtyard!

t_ch: …真的好难猜啊！
t_en: It's a real mystery then!

t_ch: 话说回来，我看到的凯撒大人总是独来独往，海瑟音小姐和四位勋爵举杯共饮的时候，凯撒大人也没有和他们一起。
t_en: You know, every time I see the Great Imperator, she's by herself. Whenever Miss Hysilens and the four duxes share a toast, she's never with them either.

t_ch: 我很想知道…凯撒大人独自一人的时候都在想些什么？对于黄金裔们，还有一度能以另一种方式触及的天外世界，现在又是怎么看的呢？
t_en: I'm so curious... What does the Great Imperator think about when she's all alone? What are her thoughts now on the Chrysos Heirs, and on the world beyond the sky that was once within her reach?

t_ch: 娇小柔和的外表下，问出的问题却这么直击人心吗？
t_en: For someone with such a gentle and petite appearance, your questions are remarkably sharp and insightful.

t_ch: 与你说说也无妨，不与众爵共饮，单纯是因为君王要保持清晰的头脑，对于法吉娜的蜜酿，啜饮一口足矣，再多的话，我暂且无福消受。
t_en: I don't mind sharing. The reason I don't drink with the duxes is simply that a monarch must keep a clear head. One sip of Phagousa's honey brew is plenty for me. For now, any more than that is a pleasure I cannot afford.

t_ch: 嗯嗯，记下了，凯撒大人能喝下的蜜酿，大概…约等于小伊卡能喝下的十分之一吧。
t_en: Mm-hmm, noted. The amount of honey brew that the Great Imperator can drink is about... one-tenth of what Little Ica can handle.

t_ch: 咳！至于逐火的后辈们，该由臣子觐见君王，岂有君王无故召见的道理？
t_en: Ahem! As for the younger generation of Flame-Chasers, it is only proper for a subject to seek an audience with their monarch, not the other way around.

t_ch: 哦！我猜得没错，比起主动接近其他人，凯撒大人在等待被我们主动接近！
t_en: Oh! So I was right! The Great Imperator doesn't initiate contact. She prefers us to take the lead!

t_ch: 好生无礼！「摇光爵」，你在言辞犀利这方面…竟然毫不输给「冬霖爵」……
t_en: How insolent! When it comes to sharp words, Dux Lucens... you're every bit the equal of the Dux Brumalis.

t_ch: 凯撒观察报告，堂堂出炉！
t_en: And now, presenting... my official Imperator Observation Report!

t_ch: 这是风宝的职业习惯了。
t_en: That's just Cinny's professional habit.

t_ch: 只剩最后一个问题了，再说说吧！
t_en: Only one question left. Tell me more!

t_ch: 天外世界的看法么？我反倒要感谢{NICKNAME}，比起「毁灭」那无数颗闪烁的星星，我很高兴，它们最终还是踏上了有无限可能的道路。
t_en: My thoughts on the world beyond the sky? For that, I have {NICKNAME} to thank. I am glad that instead of facing "Destruction," those countless stars were ultimately set upon a path of infinite possibilities.

t_ch: 现在的我偶尔也在想，对弈之外，说不定我也可以培养些新的爱好，比如……
t_en: Now I occasionally find myself thinking that, outside of chess, perhaps I could pick up a new hobby, like...

t_ch: 用奏乐的方式征服人心？
t_en: Conquering the hearts of the people through music?

t_ch: 和小伊卡进行蜜酿大比拼？
t_en: A honey brew showdown with Little Ica?

t_ch: 且慢，我似乎遗漏了什么，刚才盘点有可能贴这张贴纸的人，是不是跳过了一位？
t_en: Wait a minute. I seem to have missed something. While taking stock of the possible culprits behind this sticker, did we skip over someone?

t_ch: 诶嘿嘿，是吗？没有吧，没有啦！
t_en: Hehe, did we now? I don't think so, not at all!

t_ch: 「摇光爵」，竟然会采用这样的方式突破对方的心理距离，但又不令人反感，如此说来，倒是她独特的天赋……
t_en: The way Dux Lucens closes the emotional distance without causing offense... It is, in its own way, a unique talent of hers...

t_ch: 是逐火的大前辈和小后辈！
t_en: A great senior of the Flame-Chase and her lil' junior!

t_ch: 要说年龄，我们相隔了上千年，却有种一见如故的亲切。咳，让任何人初见的时候感到亲切，也是她的天赋之一吧。
t_en: In terms of age, we are more than a thousand years apart, yet I feel a strange kinship, as if meeting an old friend. Ahem... I suppose making anyone feel comfortable upon first meeting is another of her talents.

t_ch: 毕竟不是谁都能上来就叫宝。
t_en: After all, not everyone can start using nicknames straightaway.

t_ch: 这一声声宝…既有技巧，又有感情，的确很容易让人迷失。
t_en: All these sweet nicknames... They're delivered with such skill and affection that one can easily get lost in them.

t_ch: 我很欣赏她的个性，总有人因凯撒的威严对我心生敬畏，事实上，君王诞生于臣民当中，也应永远与臣民同在。
t_en: I quite admire her personality. Many revere and fear my authority as the Imperator, but in truth, a monarch is born from her subjects and should always stand with them.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 当然有——我的「后」棋，亦是我棋盘上的干将。
t_en: Of course there is. My "Queen" piece, who is also a mighty general upon my chessboard.

t_ch: 「后」是实力最强的棋子，来去如风，不可多得。希望你的旅程也能如它一般自由。
t_en: The "Queen" is the most powerful piece on the board. It moves like the wind and is truly one of a kind. I hope your journey can be just as free.

t_ch: 期待你的其他职业道路。
t_en: I look forward to your future career choices.

t_ch: 无论棋手还是其他身份，凯撒的准则便是——要做就做到最好，我将成为这个领域的神明！
t_en: Whatever I undertake, be it chess or any other pursuits, my code is simple: be the best. I will become the standard by which all others are judged!

t_ch: 除了缇宝老师，每次我和大家说话都要仰着脖子，但凯撒大人却特别地平易*近人*呢，嘿嘿，真是一位让人感到亲切的陛下。
t_en: I'm always craning my neck when I talk to others, aside from Lady Tribbie. But you're so "down-to-earth," Great Imperator, literally!

t_ch: 知道了，我马上蹲下！
t_en: Alright, I'll crouch down right now!

t_ch: 哎呀，要说善解人意，灰宝才是第一名！
t_en: Aww, and you're the most considerate of them all, Grayie!

t_ch: 往凯撒头上贴纸，你是头一个。
t_en: A sticker on the Imperator's head... You're the first one to ever pull that off.

t_ch: 还以为能蒙混过关呢，凯撒大人真是心细如发，是下棋带来的思维训练吗？能缜密地发现每处不对劲的细节。
t_en: Ah, I thought I'd gotten away with it~ Nothing gets past the Great Imperator. Is meticulously seeing through every illogical detail a takeaway from chess practice?

t_ch: 但是，被我猜中了，她果然不讨厌我这样做吧！
t_en: But I was right! She doesn't actually mind, does she?

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 希望你铭记的东西…呀，看你期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
t_en: Something to remember...? Oh, judging by your eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?

t_ch: 正好，你瞧，这是昏光庭院的新产品——小伊卡限量周边！本来已经被人抢完了，幸亏我自己还留着一个，灰宝就把它捎回家吧！
t_en: Perfect timing! Look, this is Twilight Courtyard's new product, Limited Edition Little Ica merch! They were all sold out, but luckily I kept one for myself. Here, Grayie, take it home with you!

t_ch: 它最精妙的设计是，只要捏一捏，就能用小伊卡的声音唱歌哦！你听——嘟嘟嘟嘟，嘟~嘟~嘟嘟——
t_en: The most ingenious part of the design is that with just a gentle squeeze, it can sing in Little Ica's voice! Listen—Doot-doot-doot-doot, doot~doot~doot-doot—

t_ch: 我也想要风宝的小贴纸。
t_en: I want a little sticker from Cinny, too.

t_ch: 好啦！我会为灰宝准备的，想要健康小提醒、心情晴雨单，还是手绘的小表情？都可以满足哦！
t_en: Okay! I'll make some just for you, Grayie. Would you like health reminders, daily mood trackers, or maybe some little hand-drawn emojis? I can make anything you want!

t_ch: 今后不再需要四处奔走传播神谕了，所以商量一下，*我们*要做些什么好呢。
t_en: Since we don't need to run around delivering prophecies anymore, what should we do now? Let's see...

t_ch: 不需要开百界门…突然，感觉很无聊！
t_en: No more opening the Century Gate... Ugh, everything feels so boring all of a sudden!

t_ch: 缇宁…好想睡觉……
t_en: I'm... so sleepy...

t_ch: 去送快递。
t_en: You could make deliveries.

t_ch: 送快递？就是把大家想要的东西送到他们手里吗？
t_en: Deliveries? Like, bringing things that people want to them?

t_ch: *我们*可以用阿雅的万帷网，来收集大家想要的东西。
t_en: We can use Agy's World Wound Web to find out what everyone wants.

t_ch: 然后，好多个*我们*，把东西送到！
t_en: And then, a whole bunch of us can deliver everything!

t_ch: 这样的话，那*我们*可得好好想一个响亮的口号啦。
t_en: If we're doing that, then we need to think of a catchy slogan!

t_ch: 可以用百界门送过去。
t_en: You can deliver things with the Century Gate.

t_ch: 有百界门，不管多远，都能马上送到！
t_en: With the Century Gate, we can deliver things instantly, no matter the distance!

t_ch: 口号我都想好啦，就叫：「开门！缇宝快递！」
t_en: I've got one! How about... "Knock knock! Tribbie Delivery!"

t_ch: 可以用火箭发射过去。
t_en: You can launch it over with a rocket.

t_ch: 啊！这个，我想到一个口号：「缇宝快递！使命必达！」
t_en: Ooh! I've got one for that: "Tribbie lives to deliver!"

t_ch: 会把包裹炸坏的啦！
t_en: But that would blow up the packages!

t_ch: 继续当老师教书。
t_en: You could continue teaching.

t_ch: 嗯，我也很喜欢课堂上认真听讲的大家呢。
t_en: Mmm, I do like all the attentive students in our classes.

t_ch: 不如，尝试教些其他课程吧！
t_en: Maybe we could try teaching different classes!

t_ch: 话是这么说，可是该教些什么呢？
t_en: That's true, but what should we teach?

t_ch: 缇宝老师，我想学变魔术。
t_en: Lady Tribbie, I want to learn how to do magic tricks.

t_ch: 魔术？哎呀，这可伤脑筋了，*我们*也从来没有学过变魔术呀。
t_en: Magic tricks? Oh dear, that's a tough one. We have never learned how to do magic tricks ourselves.

t_ch: 要不…你去问问小夏，如果是他的话，一定知道很多奇奇怪怪的东西。
t_en: Why don't you go ask Naxy? I'm sure he knows all sorts of weird and wonderful things.

t_ch: 缇宝老师，我想学做火箭。
t_en: Lady Tribbie, I want to learn how to build rockets.

t_ch: 火箭？不行不行…那实在是太危险了。
t_en: Rockets? Absolutely not... that's way too dangerous.

t_ch: 还是说，小灰只是想看烟花？这样的话，*我们*可以教你如何制作烟花呀。
t_en: Or are you saying that you just want to see some fireworks? If that's the case, we can teach you how to make those, Little Gray.

t_ch: 唔…感觉，好像没区别！
t_en: Hmm... Doesn't feel like there's much of a difference!

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 当然有啦！
t_en: Of course!

t_ch: 锵锵！这是*我们*缝制的娃娃，怎么样，很可爱吧？
t_en: Ta-da! This is a doll that we made. Adorable, isn't it?

t_ch: 如果小小灰以后想我们了，就捏一捏这个娃娃吧。
t_en: If you ever miss us, just give the doll a little squeeze, Little Gray!

t_ch: 如果担心晚上会做噩梦的话，就抱着它睡觉吧。
t_en: If you're worried about having nightmares, just cuddle it in your arms.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，*我们*希望能够像天上的星星一样，散布在每一个你失眠的夜晚。而现在，小灰也有一颗属于自己的星星啦！
t_en: Hehe, we hope to be like the stars in the sky, scattered across every sleepless night of yours. And now, you have a star of your very own, Little Gray!

t_ch: 从今以后，不会再有离别。
t_en: From now on, no more goodbyes.

t_ch: 嗯！大家都会永远、永远相聚在美好的明天！
t_en: Yes! We'll all be together, not just tomorrow, but forever and ever and ever!

t_ch: 听说心有灵犀的人，哪怕各自旅行，也会走到同一个终点。也许这就是我们在哀丽秘榭重逢的原因吧。
t_en: They say kindred spirits, even when traveling different separately, will eventually arrive at the same destination. Perhaps that's why we reunited here in Aedes Elysiae.

t_ch: 我以为见不到你了……
t_en: I thought I'd never see you again...

t_ch: 至少此刻，我们又见面了，不是吗？
t_en: At least for this moment, we meet again, don't we?

t_ch: 别走了，留在这儿吧。
t_en: Don't go, stay here.

t_ch: 很可惜，这次恐怕我无法回应你啦。
t_en: I'm afraid I won't be able to say yes to you this time.

t_ch: 在战胜铁墓后，我在来时路上独自走了很远很远。
t_en: After defeating Irontomb, I walked alone for a long way back on the path I came from.

t_ch: 为了让这篇浪漫的故事有始有终，我把所有的墨水都用完了，也许，这就是我们最后一次相见啦。
t_en: To give this romantic tale a proper beginning and end, I've used up all my ink. Perhaps this is our final meeting.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的故事虽然暂时封笔了，但你的故事还很漫长。如果在某一页你踟蹰不前，一定要记得向前看哦。
t_en: Though the story of Amphoreus has reached its final page for now, your own story still has many chapters ahead. If you ever find yourself stuck on a page, remember to keep looking forward.

t_ch: 毕竟，有人会在过去等你，那么一定也有人…会在未来等你吧。哎呀，听上去就好浪漫呀！
t_en: After all, if someone's waiting for you in the past, then surely someone... must be waiting for you in the future too. Ah, just hearing that sounds so romantic!

t_ch: 可是，我还想见你。
t_en: But I still want to see you.

t_ch: 我会把你留在记忆里。
t_en: I will keep you in my memories.

t_ch: 你说多巧，人家也是这么想的。
t_en: What a coincidence, I was thinking the same thing!

t_ch: 我们曾在哀丽秘榭共度过一段恬静美好的时光。那时候我问过你，以后回想起来，会怎么想象当时的我？
t_en: We shared some peaceful, beautiful moments together at Aedes Elysiae. Back then, I asked you, when you look back on these times, how will you picture me?

t_ch: 有点忘记那回事了。
t_en: I kinda forgot about that.

t_ch: 我选的「会更胖一些」。
t_en: I chose, "A bit chubbier."

t_ch: 嗯，对也不对，人家明明是更成长了一些哦。
t_en: Hmm, yes and no. I've actually grown up quite a bit, you know~

t_ch: 想回到过去……
t_en: I wanna go back to the past...

t_ch: 和你度过的点点滴滴，我都记得。你呢？有没有把人家好好放在心里呀？要记得常看如我所书，多让我们陪陪你哦。
t_en: I remember every little moment we spent together. What about you? Have you kept me close to your heart? Remember to review As I've Written often, and let us keep you company!

t_ch: 接下来，我会基于你的记忆，将那段岁月唤回哀丽秘榭，作为最后的相片陪伴你。
t_en: Next, based on your memories, I will recall those days to Aedes Elysiae, as the final photograph to accompany you.

t_ch: 那时…往昔的涟漪会带着故事——与你再度{RUBY_B#初见}重逢{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: At that time... the ripples of past reverie will carry stories and {RUBY_B#first encounter}meet{RUBY_E#} you once again.

t_ch: 呼~感觉有点困了…是时候闭上眼睛，去梦里相见啦……
t_en: *yawn* I'm feeling kinda sleepy... Time for some shuteye. See you in dreamland...

t_ch: 呼…呼……
t_en: Zzz... Zzz...

t_ch: 明天…要种花…要唱歌……
t_en: Tomorrow... gotta plant flowers... gotta sing...

t_ch: 把手伸进水里…感受到了吗？风轻轻吹过水面，就会变成涟漪。
t_en: Put your hand in the water... Can you feel it? When the wind gently blows across the surface, it creates ripples.

t_ch: 记得我为什么喜欢秋千吗？因为一摇一摆，就能触碰到天空。
t_en: Remember why I love swings? Because with each sway back and forth, I can touch the sky.

t_ch: 好宁静的麦田…哀丽秘榭的时光，再也不会被打扰啦。
t_en: Such a peaceful wheat field... The tranquil moments of Aedes Elysiae will never be disturbed again.

t_ch: 有时，我会梦见自己变成了一颗小小的种子。
t_en: Sometimes, I dream of becoming a tiny seed.

t_ch: 这一定意味着，新的故事正在某个地方发芽吧？
t_en: This must mean that a new story is sprouting somewhere, right?

t_ch: 海的那边是什么？已经有答案啦！还是海，广袤无垠的星海。
t_en: What lies beyond the sea? We've got the answer! More sea! The vast, endless sea of stars.

t_ch: 你说，在星海里濯足是什么感觉？开玩笑的，听说宇宙可冷啦。
t_en: I wonder what it feels like to dip your feet in the starry sea? Just kidding, I heard the universe is freezing cold!

t_ch: 看这尊神像，欧洛尼斯也是我们的好伙伴。
t_en: Look at this statue. Oronyx is our good buddy too.

t_ch: 多奇妙的缘分呀。你、我，还有三月七，都担任过岁月的半神呢。
t_en: What a fascinating twist of fate. You, me, and March 7th... We've all served as demigods of Time.

t_ch: 昔涟坐在棚顶上看风景。你想起一句诗：「明月装饰了你窗子，你装饰了别人的梦……」
t_en: Cyrene sits on the roof, taking in the scenery. A poem comes to your mind: "The bright moon adorns your window, while you adorn someone else's dreams..."

t_ch: 不过，昔涟发现你了。她没有出声，只是眨了眨眼，对你露出一个微笑。
t_en: However, Cyrene noticed you. She didn't say anything, just blinked and gave you a smile.

t_ch: 你说，会不会有人在这里敲击风铃，举办一场小小的音乐会呢？
t_en: Say, do you think someone might ring these wind chimes and put on a little concert here?

t_ch: 光是看着绿茵茵的作物，人家就能想象出一桌佳肴的样子！
t_en: Just looking at those lush green crops makes me imagine a whole feast laid out on the table!

t_ch: 把蔬果培育得这么漂亮，小妖精们一定费了不少心思吧？
t_en: The fairies must have put a lot of thought into nurturing such beautiful fruits and vegetables, huh?

t_ch: 好搭档，你终于来了。
t_en: Partner, you're finally here.

t_ch: 每次那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅站在一起，就意味着奥赫玛要被闹得天翻地覆，哪怕是现在，我也不敢精神放松啊……
t_en: Every time Professor Anaxa and Aglaea stand together, it means Okhema is about to be turned upside down. Even now, I can't let my guard down...

t_ch: 他们在聊什么？
t_en: What are they talking about?

t_ch: 有瓜？让我也吃一吃！
t_en: Ooh, drama? Count me in!

t_ch: 呵，我都听到了。
t_en: Heh, I heard all of that.

t_ch: 并无大事，我只是想找人讨论一下，最近街头新流传的泰坦神话。
t_en: Nothing major, I just wanted to find someone to discuss the new Titan myths circulating on the streets lately.

t_ch: 我说什么来着？就算没了金线，大名鼎鼎的「金织」女士还是那么爱监听人们的动向。还有你，白厄——
t_en: What did I tell you? Even without the golden thread, the illustrious Lady Goldweaver still loves keeping tabs on everyone. And you, Phainon...

t_ch: 不巧，我也知道你要说什么——
t_en: As luck would have it, I also know what you're about to say...

t_ch: 「白厄跟那女人有样学样，不肯放过一点风吹草动，他到底像谁的学生？」
t_en: "Phainon's just like that lady, not letting even the smallest detail slip by. Whose student is he really?"

t_ch: 被看穿了啊那刻夏老师…
t_en: Busted, Professor Anaxa...

t_ch: 我的脑子是什么公共文件吗？一个两个都喜欢来擅自解读。
t_en: Is my brain some kind of publicly shared folder? Everyone just loves to come and interpret it as they please.

t_ch: 别争了，我们都是他的老师。
t_en: Stop arguing, we're all his teachers.

t_ch: 啊？搭档，你在说什么？
t_en: Huh? Partner, what are you talking about?

t_ch: 街头流传的泰坦神话，我有种不妙的预感，难道是那本<color=#dbc291ff>《隐秘之恨：蝶与树》</color>？
t_en: The Titan myths circulating on the streets... I have a bad feeling about it. Could it be that one called Hidden Hatred: The Butterfly and the Tree?

t_ch: 「名为墨涅塔的少女在树庭求学时得到了瑟希斯的青睐，但瑟希斯发现，她的亲近实则是为了获得学术指导，两人的关系由此变得复杂了起来……」
t_en: "A girl named Mnestia caught Cerces' attention while studying at the Grove, but Cerces discovered that her closeness was merely to gain academic guidance, which made their relationship grow complicated..."

t_ch: …那刻夏老师，我可以接着说吗？
t_en: ...Professor Anaxa, may I continue?

t_ch: 问我干什么？写的是瑟希斯，关我阿那克萨戈拉斯什么事？
t_en: Why are you asking me? It's about Cerces, what does it have to do with me?

t_ch: 这个…毕竟有人觉得这本书里描绘的「裂分之枝」和「黄金之茧」，是在影射某次新轮回嘛！
t_en: Well... After all, some people think that the Bough of Rift and Chrysalis of Gold depicted in this book are alluding to a certain new cycle!

t_ch: 「多年以后，两人的继任者进一步变成了水火不容的关系。一次碰面，他们互相指责对方不用正眼看自己，险些大打出手。」
t_en: "Years later, their successors' relationship deteriorated to the point of becoming sworn enemies. During one encounter, they accused each other of not even deigning to look at one another properly, and nearly came to blows."

t_ch: 哦！还有后记：「所谓神话都掺杂了后人附会，两位泰坦并没有传说中的那么相亲相爱，不过只是一点零星的合作关系……」
t_en: Oh! And there's a postscript: "All myths get embellished by later generations. These two Titans weren't as lovey-dovey as the legends suggest, they just had some occasional collaboration..."

t_ch: 所以，阿那克萨戈拉斯，你怎么看？
t_en: So, Anaxagoras, what do you think?

t_ch: 要我说，唯一可取的只有一点。
t_en: If you ask me, there's only one redeeming quality about it.

t_ch: 一点零星的合作？
t_en: A bit of occasional collaboration?

t_ch: 所谓神话都掺杂了后人附会。
t_en: All myths are mixed with later embellishments.

t_ch: 不错，的确是学士的灼见。是我的针脚犹豫了。
t_en: Indeed, that's quite an astute observation from a scholar. I was the one being hesitant with my stitches.

t_ch: 我没听错吧，阿格莱雅当面夸赞那刻夏老师了？
t_en: Did I hear that right? Aglaea actually praised Professor Anaxa to his face?

t_ch: 自从双眼复明后，我重新拾起了「织者」的工作。书店的克帖西芬委托我织一副泰坦神话主题的挂毯，放在她的店铺里。
t_en: Since regaining my sight, I've resumed my work as a "weaver." Ctesiphona from the bookstore commissioned me to weave a Titan-mythology-themed tapestry for her shop.

t_ch: ——但听到了街头流传的这些新版本，我也思忖起了要如何编排剪裁。
t_en: ...Though, after hearing these new versions circulating in the streets, I started contemplating how to arrange and edit them.

t_ch: 这倒稀奇，「金织」女士什么时候这么在乎人们的看法了？
t_en: Well, that's rare. Since when did Lady Goldweaver start caring about what others think?

t_ch: 毕竟这双新生的眼眸，与刚开始观察世界的孩童无异，要看和学的东西还有很多。
t_en: After all, these new pair of eyes were no different from those of a child first observing the world. There was still so much to see and learn.

t_ch: 新世界的人们也得从一段更好的故事里了解过往「历史」，不是吗？
t_en: The people of the new world deserve to learn about the "history" through a better story, don't they?

t_ch: 呵！既然如此，别忘了我们身边就有一位——{NICKNAME}，听说你正打算把翁法罗斯的故事带到天外……
t_en: Hah! Speaking of which, we have someone right here. {NICKNAME}, I heard you're planning to take the story of Amphoreus beyond the sky...

t_ch: 要编织挂毯，{F#她}{M#他}的故事岂非最好的蓝本？
t_en: To weave a tapestry, wouldn't {F#her}{M#his} story make the perfect blueprint?

t_ch: 交给我！我下笔绝对公正客观。
t_en: Leave it to me! I'll write with absolute fairness and objectivity.

t_ch: 放心，诸位的关系我自有判断。
t_en: Don't worry, I can figure out everyone's relationships on my own.

t_ch: 那我便期待你将故事再次带回的一天了。
t_en: Then I'll look forward to the day when you bring the story back again.

t_ch: 接下委托时还不觉得，真正编织起来才意识到，这副挂毯可是个大工程。
t_en: I didn't realize it when I took the assignment, but now that I'm actually weaving it, this tapestry is turning out to be quite the undertaking.

t_ch: 给织坊多招几个人吧。
t_en: Let's hire more people for the weaving workshop.

t_ch: 正和我想的一样。至于如何招揽…还要略施一些小手段，等我的好消息吧。
t_en: Just as I thought. As for recruitment... I'll need to employ some tricks. Wait for my good news.

t_ch: 复明的感觉如何？
t_en: How does it feel to have your sight back?

t_ch: 呵…有浪漫之处，亦有不便之处。
t_en: Heh... It has its romantic aspects, as well as its inconveniences.

t_ch: 不便在于，人们心之所想、目光之所往，诸多本可凭借金丝知晓的细末之事，如今我要重新学着去阅读了。
t_en: The inconvenience lies in having to relearn how to read all those subtle details, like people's thoughts and where their gazes wander. Things I used to easily discern through the golden thread.

t_ch: 而浪漫之处在于…无论是对比显著的色彩、光泽，抑或布料上最细微的纤绒，都可以靠着人类的双眼看清。
t_en: And what makes it romantic is... whether it's the stark contrast of colors and luster, or the finest fibers on the fabric, they can all be seen clearly with the human eye.

t_ch: 无疑，奥赫玛的领袖需要能够纵览万物的金丝；而一位普通的织者，却只需要一双明媚的眼眸。
t_en: Without doubt, the leader of Okhema must command golden threads that can see all things, while an ordinary weaver only needs a pair of bright eyes.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 这枚物件，你一定很熟悉了——那位聋哑女孩送我的髀石护身符，我希望能将它转交给你。
t_en: You must be familiar with this item. It's the talisman made of femoral stone that the non-hearing, non-speaking girl gave me. I'd like to pass it on to you.

t_ch: 虽然它已不再具备墨涅塔的神力，但它依然是最纯粹的「浪漫」象征。希望高洁的灵魂能够永远守护你的旅程。
t_en: Though it no longer possesses Mnestia's divine power, it remains the purest symbol of "Romance." May the spirit of nobility forever guard your journey.

t_ch: 一直以来…辛苦了。
t_en: Thank you for your hard work all this while.

t_ch: 啊，感谢你直抒胸臆的慰藉。托你的福，我卸下了重担，终于可以感慨一句，那确实是一番苦旅……
t_en: Ah, thank you for your heartfelt comfort. Thanks to you, I've been able to unburden myself, and I can finally say... it truly was a grueling journey...

t_ch: 但我从未怨悔。
t_en: But I've never regretted it.

t_ch: 关于那本书，我可以说实话了吗——什么乱七八糟的，写的都什么玩意？
t_en: About that book, can I be honest now? What a complete mess. What on earth was that nonsense even about?

t_ch: 你终于忍不了了。
t_en: Finally! I knew you wouldn't be able to endure that.

t_ch: 哼，我的泰坦神话课上，零分重修的学生，写出来的也能比它多卖几个利衡币。
t_en: Hmph, even students who failed and had to retake my Titan Mythology class could earn more Balance Coins with their writing than this.

t_ch: 我觉得大家读得很津津有味啊。
t_en: I think everyone's really getting into it.

t_ch: 是吗？会欣赏这部作品的人，应当是被墨涅塔和瑟希斯合力诅咒了的人吧。
t_en: Really? Anyone who appreciates this work must have been cursed by both Mnestia and Cerces.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 拿着它吧。「贤者之石」——人们曾称它为炼金术至高的冠冕，获得它便能得到此世的一切智慧。但与整个宇宙的知识相比，那不过是冰山一角。
t_en: Take this. This is the "Philosopher's Stone." Once hailed as the supreme crown of alchemy, possessing it meant gaining all wisdom of this world. But compared to the knowledge of the entire universe, it's merely the tip of an iceberg.

t_ch: 没有任何东西能让你获得智慧，除了「我们对智慧还一无所知」的认知。
t_en: Nothing can grant you wisdom except the realization that "we know nothing of wisdom at all."

t_ch: 希望它能让你铭记这一点。
t_en: I hope this will help you remember that.

t_ch: 真理和八卦同样重要！
t_en: Truth and gossip are equally important!

t_ch: 呵，这又是哪里的箴言？罢了……
t_en: Huh, where's that proverb from? Never mind...

t_ch: 多亏有我在场，不然真不敢想现场会是什么样，火药味总算没那么浓了，是吧？
t_en: Good thing I was there, I don't even want to imagine what would've happened otherwise. At least the tension's not as thick now, right?

t_ch: 他们从认识起就剑拔弩张吗？
t_en: Have they been at each other's throats since they first met?

t_ch: 至少在我加入逐火之后，见到的两位就是这样了。
t_en: At least that's how the two of them were when I joined the Flame-Chase.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅都是懂得审时度势的人，危机面前能放下成见，携手合作……
t_en: Professor Anaxa and Aglaea were both people who knew how to read the situation. In times of crisis, they could set aside their differences and work together...

t_ch: 现在一切归于平静，他们却针尖对麦芒地拌起了嘴，哎，只能说…人和人之间的气场还真是玄妙啊！
t_en: Now that everything's calm, they're at each other's throats bickering... *sigh* I guess you could say... the chemistry between people really is a mysterious thing!

t_ch: 还有街头读物吗？再来几本。
t_en: Got any more street reads? Hook me up.

t_ch: 有的有的，这样的书我还看过好几本。像什么《我的逐火之旅果然有问题》、《凯撒陛下的专属剑姬》、《神明学校的逃课猫咪》……
t_en: Of course, I've read quite a few books like that. Stuff like Something's Wrong with My Flame-Chase Journey, The Imperator's Personal Blade Maiden, The Class-Skipping Cat at Divine Academy...

t_ch: 嘘，我们小声点，要是你感兴趣，我带你去书铺里悄悄看。
t_en: Shh, let's keep our voices down. If you're interested, I'll take you to the bookstore to peek quietly.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 突然这么正经吗？那我也不得不郑重地掏出这样东西了。
t_en: Why are you getting all serious all of a sudden? Ah well, you left me no choice but to solemnly pull out this thing.

t_ch: 原先，我想把「侵晨」托付给你，但它见证了太多无谓的杀戮，恐怕不是件合适的礼物。
t_en: Originally, I wanted to entrust Dawnmaker to you, but it has witnessed too much pointless bloodshed. I fear it wouldn't make for an appropriate gift.

t_ch: 正巧哈托努斯在铸造它时，曾打造过一批仿件，这把就给你留作纪念吧，伙伴。
t_en: As luck would have it, Chartonus made a batch of replicas while forging it. I'll let you keep this one as a memento, partner.

t_ch: 奥赫玛可少不了你。
t_en: Okhema can't do without you.

t_ch: 虽然很乐意被你夸，但——还是别打趣啦！
t_en: While I appreciate the compliment, stop teasing me already!

t_ch: 万敌阁下，你…怎么也来了？
t_en: Lord Mydei, what... what brings you here?

t_ch: …遐蝶？你也是来参加活动的？
t_en: ...Castorice? Are you here for the event too?

t_ch: 是的，但我还不知道，万敌阁下居然也要参加。难道说，你也准备好了手工制品？
t_en: Yes, but I had no idea that Lord Mydei would be participating too. Don't tell me you've also prepared some handicrafts?

t_ch: 制品？是说食材吗？我也很意外，你会报名新一轮的黄金厨神争霸赛……
t_en: Crafts? You mean ingredients? I'm also surprised that you signed up for the new Master Chrysos Chef Championship...

t_ch: 厨、厨神争霸赛？这里不是翁法罗斯第一届手工制品交流会现场吗？
t_en: A—A Culinary Showdown? Isn't this supposed to be the 1st Amphoreus Handicraft Convention?

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 到底是谁走错片场了？
t_en: Who the heck wandered onto the wrong set?

t_ch: 这两个消息我怎么都没听说？
t_en: How have I not heard about either of these?

t_ch: 我收到了一封「遐蝶小姐亲启」的邀请函，上面写了手工制品交流会的时间和地点，还盖上了元老院的火漆印。
t_en: I received an invitation addressed "Dear Miss Castorice," with the time and location of a handicraft exchange meeting, sealed with the Council of Elders' wax seal.

t_ch: 呀。这火漆印，怎么是带栅格反光效果的，迎着星光看的话……
t_en: Huh. This wax seal... why does it have a grid-like reflective effect? When you look at it under the starlight...

t_ch: 是赛飞儿的猫咪硬币形状？
t_en: Is it in the shape of Cipher's cat coin?

t_ch: 没错……
t_en: That's correct...

t_ch: 果然，我也收到了一封同样形式的邀请函，信中还说，这次会有来自天外的异世界美食厨神参赛，带来全新的银河口味菜品，我一时疏忽…大意了。
t_en: Sure enough, I also received an invitation in the same format. The letter mentioned that this time, there would be a legendary chef from another world beyond the sky participating, bringing new cosmic-flavored dishes. I let my guard down... I was careless.

t_ch: 幸亏不是扳手腕大赛。
t_en: Good thing it wasn't an arm wrestling contest.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下居然还记得，赛飞儿阁下替我报名的那场扳手腕大赛。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you still remember that arm-wrestling tournament Lady Cipher signed me up for.

t_ch: 但现在，我已不再身负「死亡」，这双手恐怕也无法赢过万敌阁下了。
t_en: But now, I no longer bear the authority of Death. These hands of mine probably can't defeat Lord Mydei anymore.

t_ch: 这猫猫很坏了。
t_en: This kitty has gone bad.

t_ch: 我该早点想到的，赛飞儿阁下肯定玩心大发，按捺不住想要在新世界施展诡计，捉弄捉弄大家……
t_en: I should have known earlier that Lady Cipher would be up to her tricks, unable to resist playing her mischievous games in this new world to mess with everyone...

t_ch: 不知道赛飞儿阁下还用同样的伎俩骗了多少人，还是…不会只有我们两个被骗了吧？
t_en: I wonder how many others Cipher has tricked with the same ploy... or could we be the only two who fell for it?

t_ch: 一道懒洋洋的声音从半空传来——
t_en: A lazy voice drifted down from above.

t_ch: 「没那么夸张，只准备了四封！另外两封正打算寄给救世小子和裁缝女，邀请他们穿上自己搭配的新衣服，去参加新一季时装展览……」
t_en: "It's not that dramatic, I only prepared four letters! The other two are meant for our little deliverer boy and the tailor girl, inviting them to wear their self-coordinated new outfits to the new season's fashion exhibition..."

t_ch: 「嘻，我可迫不及待要看裁缝女为救世小子的审美头疼了——猫猫快递，走喽！」
t_en: "Hehe, I can't wait to see the tailor girl getting headaches over our little deliverer boy's fashion sense! Meow Express, off we go!"

t_ch: 声音消失了，赛飞儿阁下…还真是精力充沛呀。
t_en: The voice faded away... Cipher sure is full of energy.

t_ch: 无妨，我能理解，新世界的岁月平稳流淌，但平凡的生活不等于一成不变，她大概是想为大家带来点新鲜事。
t_en: It's alright, I understand. Time flows peacefully in this new world, but an ordinary life doesn't mean it has to stay the same forever. She probably just wants to bring something fresh and exciting to everyone.

t_ch: …顺道满足一点恶作剧心理。
t_en: ...while satisfying her urge to pull a few mischievous pranks.

t_ch: 我也还没亲眼见过白厄阁下穿黄戴紫的模样，的确很好奇呢。
t_en: I haven't seen Lord Phainon dressed in yellow and purple either. I'm quite curious indeed.

t_ch: 那万敌带来的食材？
t_en: What about the ingredients Mydei brought?

t_ch: 若不介意，我可以现场烹饪，邀请大家一同来享用美食。
t_en: If you don't mind, I can cook them right here and invite everyone to enjoy the meal together.

t_ch: 猜猜谁不会被邀请？
t_en: Guess who's not getting an invite?

t_ch: *只有声音*「我还没走远呐！我都听得到，灰子。」
t_en: *voice only* "I haven't gone far yet! I can hear everything, Gray Mystery."

t_ch: 太好了，就要万师傅炒。
t_en: Perfect, let's have Master Mydei do the cooking.

t_ch: 可以，火候根据你的口味来定。
t_en: Sure, I'll adjust the heat to your taste.

t_ch: 那遐蝶带来的手工制品？
t_en: What about the handmade stuff from Castorice?

t_ch: 都是阁下眼熟的东西，有书签，抱枕，还有毛毡娃娃。因为赶工制作得有些粗糙，我本来想和参加交流会的大家互相交换。
t_en: These are all things you're familiar with: bookmarks, cushions, and felt dolls. They're a bit rough around the edges because I made them in a rush, but I was hoping to exchange them with everyone at the meetup.

t_ch: 嗯…但眼下，还是容许我带回去再好好修饰一下吧。
t_en: Hmm... But now, please allow me to take them back and refine them a little.

t_ch: 该期待时装展览了。
t_en: Time to look forward to the fashion exhibition.

t_ch: 那么，我有一个建议，为了胃部健康，等看完白厄的时装搭配再吃饭吧。
t_en: Well, I have a suggestion: for the good of your stomach, let's eat after we've seen Phainon's outfit.

t_ch: 万敌阁下…真的有那么夸张吗？
t_en: Lord Mydei... is it really going to be that dramatic?

t_ch: 头顶的星空，真美呀，一颗颗星星，像无数个会眨眼的灵魂。
t_en: The starry sky above is so beautiful, each star twinkling like countless blinking souls.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，如果有空，也和我一起去花园看看吧。
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, if you have time, would you like to join me for a stroll in the garden?

t_ch: 我在那里播撒了许多花种，但愿时间能冲淡那些令人怅惘的回忆，让故事的种子，再度长成一片无垠的花海。
t_en: I scattered many flower seeds there, hoping time would wash those melancholic memories away, allowing the seeds of stories to grow once again into an endless sea of flowers.

t_ch: 都种了些什么花？
t_en: What kind of flowers did you plant?

t_ch: 安提灵是生长于冥界的花朵，它素净的花瓣能带给往生者最后的安宁，但种在这里就有些不合时宜了。
t_en: Antila is a flower that grows in the nether realm. Its pure petals bring final peace to the departed, but planting it here seems rather inappropriate.

t_ch: 所以…我这次种下的都是更绚烂的花朵。
t_en: So... this time I planted even more dazzling flowers.

t_ch: 阁下，天外一定也有繁花似锦的世界吧？若有机会，请你为我捎带些旅途中偶遇的花种吧。
t_en: I believe there must be worlds blooming with lush flowers beyond the sky as well, right? If you have the chance, please bring me some flower seeds you encounter along your journey.

t_ch: 如今还有怅惘的回忆吗？
t_en: Do you still have any melancholic memories?

t_ch: 虽然人们见我时举止还是略有拘谨，但好奇的孩子们已经愿意牵起我的手，去看停驻在花丛中的蝴蝶了。
t_en: Though people are still somewhat wary around me, curious children are now willing to hold my hand as they go and watch butterflies resting among the flowers.

t_ch: 他们胖乎乎的指尖，像拥抱一样温暖。
t_en: Their chubby fingertips are as warm as a hug.

t_ch: 要说唯一的一点怅惘，便是与你的相遇。人和人的相遇和离别是常态，阁下总要踏往更远的星空……
t_en: If I must name something regretful, it would be our encounter. Meetings and partings are part and parcel of life, and you must always venture forth toward more distant stars...

t_ch: 不过，翁法罗斯因你的到来而诞生的奇迹，以及曾经相伴的那些记忆，于我而言，已经足够珍贵了。
t_en: But the miracles that your arrival brought to Amphoreus, and all those memories we shared, are already precious enough to me.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请你收下这副花冠。
t_en: Please accept this flower crown, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哀地里亚的女孩会把花冠送给即将远行的旅人，祈祷花瓣的枯萎气息帮助旅人躲过塞纳托斯的窥探，平安回到故乡。
t_en: Girls in Aidonia give flower crowns to travelers who are about to embark on long journeys. They pray that the scent of the withered petals will help the traveler evade Thanatos's gaze and return home safely.

t_ch: 但愿它也能让你平安归来。
t_en: I hope it brings you back safely, too.

t_ch: 你所在之处，便是温柔的花海。
t_en: Wherever you reside is a gentle sea of flowers.

t_ch: 若这是阁下对我的祝愿，我就轻轻收起，珍藏在心中啦。
t_en: If that is your blessing for me, then I'll gently accept and cherish it.

t_ch: 此世已是没有纷争和牺牲的世界，做得好，救世主。
t_en: This world is now free from strife and sacrifice. Well done, Deliverer.

t_ch: 没有纷争的世界，会无聊吗？
t_en: Would a world without strife be boring?

t_ch: 在我看来，纷争正是为终结纷争而存在。纵使此世必要之痛，亦有迎来愈合的一天。
t_en: In my view, strife exists to end strife itself. Though it may be a pain this world needs, there will come a day of healing.

t_ch: 何况，悬锋人的字典里可没有无聊。做好一顿饭，与夺下战功同样光荣。
t_en: Besides, there is no word for "boring" in the Kremnoan language. Preparing a good meal is just as glorious as winning battles.

t_ch: 如今这个世界不缺本应灭绝的动物，食材库丰富了许多。对任何一位喜欢烹饪的人来说，都称得上足够有趣的世界。
t_en: These days, the world is full of animals that previously went extinct, which has greatly enriched our ingredient inventory. It's quite a fascinating world for anyone who enjoys cooking.

t_ch: 黄金大饭店要开业了！
t_en: The Grand Restaurant is about to open!

t_ch: 可以挥着菜刀上战场了。
t_en: Time to charge into battle with a kitchen knife.

t_ch: 但还有诡计的恶作剧…
t_en: But there are still some tricky pranks...

t_ch: 哈哈，悬锋城流传过一句古语：猫要么在睡觉，要么在捣乱。我猜，阿格莱雅会更先按捺不住，要给她找点营生干一干了。
t_en: Haha, there's an old saying in Castrum Kremnos: cats are either sleeping or causing trouble. I bet Aglaea will be the first to get restless and find the cat something to do.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 带上这盏水晶杯吧。每位曾和我并肩作战的伙伴，都有与我碰杯的资格。
t_en: Take this crystal chalice. Everyone who has fought by my side has earned the right to share a toast with me.

t_ch: 当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
t_en: When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—

t_ch: 歌耳戈之子，迈德漠斯，向你致意。
t_en: Mydeimos, son of Gorgo, sends his regards.

t_ch: 迈德漠斯，黄金厨神之王！
t_en: Mydeimos, the Chrysos God-King of Chefs!

t_ch: 听起来，气势倒是不输「歌耳戈之子，浴血代冠」，好，这份赞誉我收下了。
t_en: Well, that sounds just as grand as "The son of Gorgo will be crowned in blood." Very well, I'll accept this praise.

t_ch: 呜嗡…嚼嚼……
t_en: *Nom nom nom...*

t_ch: 若是回归最朴素的生命本能，填满「大地」的胃袋，只需要一块块滋味丰盛的红土。
t_en: If we return to the most basic instinct of life, all it takes to fill the "Earth's" belly is rich and flavorful redsoil.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的万物生灵现如今都有了自己的归宿，我也终于能够放下重担，安心地享受美食时刻了。
t_en: All living beings in Amphoreus have found their place now, and I can finally put down my burdens and enjoy my meal in peace.

t_ch: 大地兽之王也爱吃红土？
t_en: Even the Dromas King likes redsoil too?

t_ch: 这副身躯踏上一片全新的净地时，食欲竟也在一瞬间旺盛地涌来。
t_en: As this body stepped onto this pristine new land, a sudden surge of hunger washed over me.

t_ch: 或许就像法吉娜贪恋它的秘酿一样吧，我也天然地喜爱这从「大地」熔炉中诞生的物事。炙热，酥脆，美味，你也该与我一同用牙齿仔细感受…嚼嚼……
t_en: Perhaps, just as Phagousa can't resist their ambrosia, I've always had a natural fondness for what's born from the furnace of Earth. Hot, crispy, and delicious. You should use your teeth and thoroughly enjoy this feeling with me... Nom nom...

t_ch: 聊聊天外的大地吗？
t_en: Wanna chat about the lands beyond the sky?

t_ch: 「永夜之帷」的记忆中勾勒过——你的双足丈量过不少天外的世界，为我亲口讲讲那些「大地」的模样吧。
t_en: As depicted in the memories of the Veil of Evernight, you have traversed many worlds beyond the sky. Tell me, what is the "Earth" there like?

t_ch: 遍布冰雪的大地…
t_en: A land covered in ice and snow...

t_ch: 你为荒笛讲述了冰天雪地的雅利洛-Ⅵ号，以及贝洛伯格的人们与寒潮和风雪持续千年的抗争……
t_en: You told Terravox about the frozen lands of Jarilo-VI, and how the people of Belobog have been fighting against the Eternal Freeze and blizzards for a thousand years...

t_ch: 看来，无论任何世界，生灵们都有自己和「大地」相处的方式，虽说不上反叛，却也在摩擦中不断前行呐！
t_en: It seems that in any world, living beings have their own way of dealing with the "Earth." While it may not be outright rebellion, they keep moving forward through friction!

t_ch: 漂浮在天空中的大地…
t_en: The land that floats in the sky...

t_ch: 你为荒笛讲述了漂浮在星海中的仙舟「罗浮」，那里有一株建木古树，其中的居民饱经了「丰饶」的恩赐和苦楚……
t_en: You tell Terravox about the Xianzhou Luofu drifting in the sea of stars, where an ancient Ambrosial Arbor stands, and whose inhabitants have experienced both the blessings and suffering brought by the Abundance...

t_ch: 古树…如此说来，这岂非是一种瑟希斯掌管的「大地」？
t_en: Ancient trees... In that case, could this be a form of "Earth" governed by Cerces?

t_ch: 假如有机会，我也想亲眼看一看，呜嗡…但愿我的身躯不会把那里的「大地」压沉。
t_en: If I ever get the chance, I'd love to see it with my own eyes, hmm... I just hope my body won't sink the "Earth" there.

t_ch: 由忆泡构成的…大地？
t_en: A land... made of Memory Bubbles?

t_ch: 你为荒笛讲述了梦想之地匹诺康尼，包括梦中和梦外的时刻，和一场回到「大地」的飞行……
t_en: You tell Terravox about Penacony, Land of the Dreams, including moments both inside and outside the dream, and a flight back to "Earth"...

t_ch: 背离了同胞所行之路的人，却终有机会走上了第三条路吗？有趣，我对「开拓」的理解又加深了几分。
t_en: Someone who deviated from their comrades' path yet ultimately found the chance to walk down a third path? Fascinating. I have gained a deeper understanding of the Trailblaze yet again.

t_ch: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
t_en: Is there anything you want me to remember?

t_ch: 当然，我没忘记要把这样东西郑重地交给你，和如今那位「大地」的新神——
t_en: Of course. I haven't forgotten to hand this over to you solemnly, and to that new God of "Earth"—

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的持明卵？
t_en: An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?

t_ch: 你也有蜕生之法？
t_en: Are you also capable of hatching rebirth?

t_ch: 呵呵，这只是一枚普通的大地兽蛋。
t_en: Hehe. It's just a regular dromas egg.

t_ch: 从前我和老友吉奥刻勒斯一同仰望过树庭的「星空」，每一颗星星都意味着一片更为深远的土地，我对天外群星的向往也从那时开始……
t_en: Long ago, I gazed at the "starry sky" of the Grove with my old friend Geocles. Each star represented a distant land, and that's when my yearning for the stars beyond the sky began...

t_ch: 倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
t_en: If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?

t_ch: 辛苦你守望了昨日。
t_en: Thanks for keeping watch over yesterday.

t_ch: 呜嗡…也感谢你们守护了我的心愿。昨日的守望，都是为了一起走向明天。
t_en: Grumph... Thank you all for protecting my wishes, too. We watch over yesterday to walk toward tomorrow together.

t_ch: 得闲时来我的肩膀上坐一坐，一起离那片星空更近一些吧。
t_en: When you have time, come and sit on my shoulder. Let's get a bit closer to those stars together.

t_ch: 没有「时光硕果」的帮助，记忆的航船无法远渡…只能之后再来了。
t_en: Without the help of the Fruit of Time, the ship of Remembrance cannot sail far... I can only return later.

t_ch: 啊，贵客…我能感觉到，上升的一切都将汇合。或许我很快就能回到家乡了。
t_en: Ah, honored guest... I can feel it, everything that rises must converge. Perhaps I'll be able to return home soon.

t_ch: 不过在那之前，我还有必须完成的使命…你愿意协助我，对吗？
t_en: But before that, there is a duty I must fulfill... You'll lend a hand, right?

t_ch: 一切都快结束了，终于……
t_en: It's all coming to an end, at last...

t_ch: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
t_en: Where are the remaining nymphs?

t_ch: 只需一些记忆，我便能提供协助。
t_en: With just a memory shard, I can help you out.

t_ch: 提供「记忆残晶」。
t_en: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

t_ch: 衣匠接过记忆残晶，平和地炼化。
t_en: The Garmentmaker receives the Memory Crystal Shards and calmly refines them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者摔伤受困。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>坍塌的天花板碎石边</color>哀嚎伤痛呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who got injured and trapped. The golden thread brings tidings: They're wailing in pain beside a <color=#dbc291ff>collapsed ceiling rubble</color>.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者难逃困境。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>停止运转的扇叶边</color>，为不再运转的死路愤怒呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who's stuck and in trouble. The golden thread brings tidings: They're at the <color=#dbc291ff>edge of stopped fan blades</color>, raging about the dead end that no longer turns.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者正在隐秘侦察。金丝带来消息，它正隐匿于<color=#dbc291ff>巨大空旷的房间中</color>，为一座炮台惊异呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who's doing some secret scouting. The golden thread brings tidings: They're hiding in a <color=#dbc291ff>huge, spacious platform</color>, marveling at a cannon turret.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者正在拷问自己的内心。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮封闭的门扉前</color>思索自己的答案呢。
t_en: Hmm... There's a weaver who is questioning their inner self. The golden thread brings tidings: They're contemplating their answer <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the door sealed by the black tide</color>.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者独行于朝圣之旅。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>至高的尖刺上</color>探索光的来向呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is on a solitary pilgrimage. The golden thread brings tidings: They're exploring the source of light on <color=#dbc291ff>the highest spire</color>.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者正向更高处远眺。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>高处的平台上</color>惊叹你飞行的速度呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is gazing up high. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>on the elevated platform</color>, marveling at your flying speed.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者正为逐火的前路欢欣鼓舞。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>火种的符文前</color>，等待英雄的现身呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is thrilled about the future of the Flame-Chase. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the Coreflame's runes</color>, waiting for the hero to show up.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者行动缓慢。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>向闪烁电光的高处</color>，举步维艰一步步攀登呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who moves at a burdened pace. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>climbing towards the heights where lightning flickers</color>, struggling with every step.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者迷失了自己的来路。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>残破断裂的柱子上</color>，疑惑归家的方向呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who has lost their way home. The golden thread brings tidings: They're on a <color=#dbc291ff>fractured, crumbling pillar</color>, puzzled about which way leads home.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者正在因恐高瑟瑟发抖。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>高处的数据流附近</color>，发誓永远陪伴它爱的电路板呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is trembling with fear of heights. The golden thread brings tidings: They're near the <color=#dbc291ff>data streams high above</color>, vowing to forever stay with the circuit board they love.

t_ch: 不给~
t_en: Nope~

t_ch: 那我们之后再见。
t_en: See you later then.

t_ch: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
t_en: I've found all the nymphs here.

t_ch: 想来对你没什么难度。现在，我也该完成自己的工作了……
t_en: Seems like it wasn't too hard for you. Now, it's time I fulfill my part of the deal.

t_ch: 「沿着仪式剑的源头而下，便是通向新世界的桥梁。」预言如此阐述道。
t_en: "Follow the source of the ceremonial blade downward, and you shall find the bridge to a new world." Thus spoke the prophecy.

t_ch: 仪式剑…指的应当是欧洛尼斯仪式剑，我还记得它那月牙般的形状。可源头又该如何理解？
t_en: The ceremonial blade... must be referring to the Oronyx ceremonial blade. I still remember its crescent-moon shape. But how should we interpret the source?

t_ch: 嗯…恭喜，贵客。这样一来，此地便不再有未完之事了。
t_en: Hmm... congratulations, honored guest. With this, there's nothing left unfinished here.

t_ch: 能多给我点提示吗？
t_en: Can you give me more hints?

t_ch: 「沿着仪式剑的源头而下，便是通向新世界的桥梁。」预言如此阐述道。
t_en: "Follow the source of the ceremonial blade downward, and you shall find the bridge to a new world." Thus spoke the prophecy.

t_ch: 仪式剑…指的应当是欧洛尼斯仪式剑，我还记得它那月牙般的形状。可源头又该如何理解？
t_en: The ceremonial blade... must be referring to the Oronyx ceremonial blade. I still remember its crescent-moon shape. But how should we interpret the source?

t_ch: 我去忙了。
t_en: I'll get back to work.

t_ch: 希望我们还能再见，贵客。
t_en: Hope to see you again, honored guest.

t_ch: 你好啊，贵客，我们再次见面了，于这方新创的天地中。
t_en: Hello there, honored guest. We meet again in this world newly wrought.

t_ch: 有人称之为废墟，有人称之为囚牢。但我知道，这里不过是那位英雄内心的写照，我亦如此。
t_en: Some call it ruins, others call it a prison. But I know it's nothing more than a reflection of that hero's inner world. Mine as well.

t_ch: 在一切彻底结束前，让我们先拾尽若虫——他常用来自比的对象吧。
t_en: Before all comes to an end, let's gather all the nymphs, the creatures he so often used as a metaphor for himself.

t_ch: 最后的这段路，只需要像往常那样走过就好。
t_en: Just walk this final stretch like you always do.

t_ch: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
t_en: Where are the remaining nymphs?

t_ch: 在这方心绪构成的世界里，唯有<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>能为我们指引前路。
t_en: In this world woven from emotions and thoughts, only the <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> can guide our way forward.

t_ch: 提供「记忆残晶」。
t_en: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

t_ch: 带着释怀的表情，衣匠将记忆的残晶炼化。
t_en: The Garmentmaker refines the Memory Crystal Shards with a relieved expression.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者遍历大地，找寻最美的乐章。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>无人奏响的琴边</color>，为那流溢的琴音啧啧称奇呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who roams the land, searching for the most beautiful melody. The golden thread brings tidings: They're at the <color=#dbc291ff>unplayed harp</color>, marveling at the overflowing music.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者得偿所愿。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>那血晶环绕的王座前</color>洋洋得意呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who got their wish. The golden thread brings tidings: They're gloating <color=#dbc291ff>before the throne encircled by blood crystals</color>.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者拥有惊人的财富。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>令人艳羡的金山之上</color>，炫耀地细数自己的富足呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver with staggering wealth. The golden thread brings tidings: They're lounging on <color=#dbc291ff>an enviable mountain of gold</color>, smugly counting their riches.
